items.title: Intel earnings, new-home sales, mortgage rates: What to Watch
items.description: Asking for a Trend host Josh Lipton outlines the top stories for investors to watch on Thursday, July 24. Fresh earnings will be posted in the morning from Honeywell (HON), Union Pacific (UNP), Blackstone (BX), and Keurig Dr. Pepper (KDP). In the afternoon, Intel (INTC) and Deckers (DECK) will report results. New-home sales data for June will be out in the morning. Economists are expecting an uptick to 650,000 from May's 623,000. Weekly mortgage rate data from Freddie Mac (FMCC) will be posted for the week starting July 17. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend here.

items.title: Alphabet and Tesla Earnings, Home Sales and More: Still to Come This Week
items.description: Earnings season rolls on, with the first two of the Magnificent Seven, Tesla and Alphabet, set to report later Wednesday. Plus, new economic data will shed light on how tariffs are affecting consumer and business spending, while investors watch for further trade-deal announcements.
